items.quote: We had been trying to grow on Instagram for over a year with nothing to show for it. LIVEr built us a proper system — within 6 weeks we had our first viral post and a flood of DMs from real customers.
items.name: T. Moyo

items.quote: I was invisible online despite being well-known in my field. They repositioned my personal brand and built a WhatsApp funnel. I now get 10–15 inbound enquiries a week — consistently.
items.name: C. Ndlovu

items.quote: They gave us a proper digital strategy — not just content. The clarity alone was worth it. We finally knew what to focus on and what to ignore.
items.name: R. Sithole
